articles.author: Jon Gambrell, Sam Metz, Samy Magdy
articles.title: Iranian drone damages desalination plant in Bahrain - AP News
articles.description: Bahrain has accused Iran of striking a desalination plant as the regional war expands and targets more civilian sites. Iran’s president said Sunday his country answers pressure with stronger attacks. He threatened more strikes on American targets in the Middl…
articles.content: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) Bahrain accused Iran of striking a desalination plant on Sunday, raising fears civilian infrastructure may become fair game in a nine-day-old war, as Irans president … [+6054 chars]
